features.name: fopen with write-binary mode
features.description: Code should include $fopen with "wb" mode argument for binary write access

features.name: fwrite with integer file handle and format string
features.description: Code should include $fwrite using an integer file handle, format string with %u specifier, and a 32-bit value

features.name: fwrite in for loop inside initial block
features.description: Code should include $fwrite called inside a for loop within an initial procedural block

features.name: fclose with integer file handle
features.description: Code should include $fclose with an integer file handle returned by $fopen
